name: LightRAG Knowledge
description: Registers LightRAG servers as ClawWorks enterprise knowledge foundations for knowledge_search.

id.description: Knowledge foundation id referenced by ontology.knowledgeFoundations.

serverUrl.description: Base URL of the LightRAG API server (e.g. http://localhost:9621).

description.description: One-line summary of what this foundation covers. Surfaced to the model in the step digest (so it can route knowledge_search to the right source) and to operators in the Knowledge tab. Keep it non-secret.

kind.description: Who administers this server's documents. 'local' means this deployment owns it, so operators may upload/remove its documents from the Knowledge tab; 'remote' means someone else operates it and it stays read-only (default: remote). Unrelated to the 'mode' retrieval setting below.

apiKey.description: LightRAG API key (X-API-Key). A string or an OpenClaw secret reference.
